svg.title: Shasnadesh application workflow
svg.desc: Complete workflow diagram of the Shasnadesh blog portal showing user flows, admin flows, auth, API, and PWA layers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the public visitor entry point in Shasnadesh')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PWA installed app entry point')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the admin login entry point')
sendPrompt('What does Home.jsx do in Shasnadesh?')
sendPrompt('What do Navbar and SearchFilter components do?')
sendPrompt('What does BlogCard render?')
sendPrompt('What does BlogDetail.jsx render?')
g.text: Full article · images · PDFs · video · links · share · view tracking
